---
title: "`quartable` example"
filters:
  - quartable
format: pdf
---

A short example exercising the main `quartable` features. For the full
self-documenting reference (every feature in HTML, PDF and Reveal),
see `test_quartable.qmd` and `test_reveal_quartable.qmd`, or the
[live documentation](https://zinc75.github.io/quarto-quartable/).

## Column span, row span, midrules and clines

```markdown
| [Method]{rs=2}    | [Set A]{cs=2} |        | [Set B]{cs=2} |        |
|-------------------|:-------------:|:------:|:-------------:|-------:|
| ===2-3,4-5        |               |        |               |        |
|                   | Score X       | Score Y| Score X       | Score Y|
| ===               |               |        |               |        |
| Baseline          | 0.71          | 2.1    | 0.68          |    1.9 |
| Wiener            | 0.82          | 2.8    | 0.79          |    2.6 |
| ===               |               |        |               |        |
| **Proposed**      | **0.93**      | **3.7**| **0.92**      |**3.6** |
```

| [Method]{rs=2}    | [Set A]{cs=2} |        | [Set B]{cs=2} |        |
|-------------------|:-------------:|:------:|:-------------:|-------:|
| ===2-3,4-5        |               |        |               |        |
|                   | Score X       | Score Y| Score X       | Score Y|
| ===               |               |        |               |        |
| Baseline          | 0.71          | 2.1    | 0.68          |    1.9 |
| Wiener            | 0.82          | 2.8    | 0.79          |    2.6 |
| ===               |               |        |               |        |
| **Proposed**      | **0.93**      | **3.7**| **0.92**      |**3.6** |

## Per-cell alignment override

```markdown
| Sample | Result                       |
|:-------|-----------------------------:|
| ===    |                              |
| s001   |                       1234.5 |
| s002   |                         98.7 |
| s003   | [N/A]{align=l}               |
| s004   |                        542.0 |
| s005   | [pending review]{align=c}    |
```

| Sample | Result                       |
|:-------|-----------------------------:|
| ===    |                              |
| s001   |                       1234.5 |
| s002   |                         98.7 |
| s003   | [N/A]{align=l}               |
| s004   |                        542.0 |
| s005   | [pending]{align=c}    |
